family.title: Family Profiles
family.desc: Establish health baselines, track long-term trends and abnormal alerts for your family.
family.noProfilesDesc: Create a profile to start tracking family health data.
family.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this family member? Related reports and notes will be permanently deleted.

history.syncDesc: You can assign them to a family member for cross-device trend analysis.
history.addFamilyFirst: Please add a family member first
history.loginToView: Log in to view cloud family profiles and related records

result.disclaimerStart: Disclaimer: This interpretation is generated by HealthMate AI and is for reference only to understand the medical context. It should
result.disclaimerEnd: be used as the basis for final medical diagnosis and treatment. Please rely on the diagnosis of professional doctors in physical hospitals.
result.noteDesc: You can record current medication status, personal feelings, etc. The AI will remember this and refer to trends in the next interpretation.
result.notePlaceholder: e.g. Started taking half a pill of blood pressure medicine every day this week, feeling less dizzy
result.saveNoteSuccess: Note saved securely to family records
result.noAbnormal: Great! AI didn't find any obvious abnormal indicators.
result.copySuccess: Copied to clipboard! Ready to send to the doctor.
result.docQuestionsDesc: If you need to take your family for a follow-up, you can use this checklist to ask the doctor:
result.msgForDocDesc: We've summarized the key metrics for you. One-click copy to send to your doctor friend for advice:

trend.noData: No trend data available for this indicator

pwa.title: Add to Home Screen for quick access
pwa.desc: Get the full native app experience and view reports offline.

chat.emergencyAlert: ⚠️ Emergency dangerous symptoms detected! It's recommended to call emergency services or go to the nearest ER immediately!
chat.networkError: Network error, please try again later.
chat.greeting:
Hello {{name}}! I'm your family health assistant.
I can help you interpret reports, check medication interactions, or answer health questions.

error.title: Oops, something went wrong
error.desc: An unexpected error occurred during page rendering, likely due to network delay or caching issues. Please try refreshing the page.

auth.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters long
auth.title: Log in to HealthMate
auth.sentLinkTo: We have sent an email with an exclusive link to

home.title: Family Medical Report
home.subtitle: AI Interpretation
home.desc: Capture your parents' medical reports, quickly understand key indicators. Not just translation, but your exclusive family medical assistant.

alerts.title: Proactive Alerts
alerts.desc: The system automatically notifies you of abnormal data changes, upcoming follow-ups, or when medications run out.

annual.title: Annual Health Report
annual.desc: View the 2025 family health companion summary

upload.title: Smart Report Interpretation
upload.subtitle: Upload report, AI automatically extracts and analyzes indicators
upload.interpretingDesc: Please wait, we are analyzing the report data in the cloud
upload.clickOrDrag: Click or drag to upload report
upload.supportsText1: Supports clear camera photos, album images (JPG/PNG)

annual.page1Content:
In 2025, you helped your family check 14 reports
equivalent to visiting the hospital every month.
annual.page1Highlight: Thank you for your hard work, HealthMate remembers it.
annual.page2Content:
Mom's blood pressure indicators improved by 12%
Systolic pressure returned from high risk to safe range.
annual.page2Highlight: This is the result of your joint efforts.
annual.page3Content:
In October, Dad's triglycerides were slightly high
but you took him back for a re-check two weeks later.
annual.page3Highlight: Prevention is better than cure, you are their health gatekeeper.
annual.page4Content:
Your companionship this year
had anxiety and running around, but mostly peace of mind.
annual.page4Highlight: In 2026, we will continue to walk together. ❤️

pricing.title: Choose your health plan
pricing.subtitle: Every companionship is worth cherishing. Upgrade to Pro to unlock the full platform guardian system.
pricing.localDesc: Full local model support, unlimited usage, your data stays on your device.
pricing.proDesc: Unlock cloud large models, auto sync & backup, advanced analysis, and premium support.
pricing.proFeature2: Deep analysis for full PDF medical reports
pricing.agreementPrefix: By paying, you agree to the
pricing.promise: Promise: 7-day no-reason refund | All medical advice requires consultation with professional doctors

agent.subtitle: HealthMate is deeply analyzing this report for you
agent.errorDesc: An unknown error occurred, please try again

prepare.validation: Please select a family member and enter symptoms
prepare.aiPrompt: I want to prepare for a family member's doctor visit, main symptoms: {{complaint}}. Please output in structured format: recommended medical department (with reason), materials to bring, and 8 core questions to ask the doctor.
prepare.title: Doctor Visit Preparation
prepare.symptomsPlaceholder: e.g., Mom's knees hurt lately, hard to get up after sitting

settings.title: Settings
settings.apiKeyPlaceholder: Leave blank to use platform quota (recommended)
settings.apiKeyDesc: Your API key will be strongly encrypted locally.

legal.agreementText: By continuing, you agree to our
legal.medicalDisclaimer: Disclaimer: Any advice or analysis provided by this application is generated by artificial intelligence and is for reference only. It does not constitute professional medical advice. Always consult a professional doctor before making any medical decisions. This app is not responsible for any consequences arising from the use of this service.
legal.privacyDetail: Privacy Statement: We carefully protect your health data and medical records. Sensitive information is only stored locally or transmitted via encryption. We will not share your personal data with any third parties without your explicit authorization.
